title: Optimise a Delivery Route
tagline: Sequence 5 deliveries for a driver to minimise time and mileage.
scenario: A florist in Cape Town has one driver and 5 deliveries to make this morning. The system broke, and the deliveries are just listed in the order they were purchased. The driver needs a logical sequence to follow.
brief: Review the 5 delivery addresses and their required delivery windows (provided in the prompt context). Create an optimised delivery sequence.
deliverables: A short rationale explaining why you chose this route (e.g., geographic clustering vs. time window priority)
A template SMS message to send to the 5th customer explaining their estimated time of arrival
submissionGuidance: Assume standard geographic knowledge or use Google Maps. Priority is hitting the promised time windows; secondary priority is saving fuel.

rubric.label: Time Window Adherence
rubric.description: Are the time windows respected in the sequence?

rubric.label: Customer Communication
rubric.description: Is the ETA SMS clear and professional?
